attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 BKGS.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG, 
 BKGS. PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY, 
 CASE WHEN BKGS.CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG IS NULL THEN  'N' ELSE BKGS.CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG  END CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG, 
 CASE WHEN BKGS.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE BKGS.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID END ,
 BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY,
 BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 BKGS.SALES_REP_NUM,
 BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
 BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
 SUM(BKGS.EXTENDED_QTY*CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  END),
 SUM(BKGS.EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY*CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  END),
 BKGS.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 SUM(BKGS.COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT*CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  END  ) COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 SUM(BKGS.COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT*CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  END) COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 SUM(BKGS.COMP_US_COST_AMT*CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  END) COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 SUM(BKGS.COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT*CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  END) COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 SUM(BKGS.COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT*CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  END) COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 SUM(BKGS.COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT*CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  END) COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT,
 SUM(BKGS.COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  END) COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 SUM(BKGS.TRADE_IN_AMT*CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  END),
 SUM( (CASE WHEN BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID IN ( 'AS TRANSACTION', 'AS FIXED' )  THEN COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ELSE BKGS.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT END )
  *CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  END) DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
 SUM( (CASE WHEN BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID IN ( 'AS TRANSACTION', 'AS FIXED' )  THEN 0 ELSE BKGS.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT END )
  *CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  END) DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
 BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 CASE WHEN SFH.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE SFH.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID END  ,
 BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG,
 BKGS.CANCEL_CODE,
 BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
 BKGS.DSV_FLG /* Added as part of  Q1FY16 DSV **/   ,  
 /* Added the below columns as part of  RO project  Q3FY17**/
 BKGS.XCAT_FLG,
BKGS.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
BKGS.ELA_FLG,
BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
 FROM   
 (SEL 
 BKG_CHNL_MSR.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG, 
 BKG_CHNL_MSR.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY  PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY, 
 CASE WHEN BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG IS NULL THEN  'N' ELSE BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG  END CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG, 
 CASE WHEN GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' THEN PRD.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE PRD.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END  RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
 BKGS_MSR.PRODUCT_KEY,
 BKGS_MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 BKGS_MSR.SALES_REP_NUMBER SALES_REP_NUM,
 FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
 BKGS_MSR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS_MSR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS_MSR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS_MSR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 BKGS_MSR.SERVICE_FLG,
 BKGS_MSR.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY EXTENDED_QTY,
 BKGS_MSR.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY,
 BKGS_MSR.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT,
 DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 BKGS_MSR.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 BKGS_MSR.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT TRADE_IN_AMT,
 DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
 DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
 BKGS_MSR.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 BKGS_MSR.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 BKGS_MSR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 BKGS_MSR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 CANCEL_CODE,
 BKGS_MSR.DV_FMV_FLG,
 BKGS_MSR.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
 BKGS_MSR.DSV_FLG /* Added as part of  Q1FY16 DSV **/,
/* Added the below columns as part of  RO project  Q3FY17**/
 BKGS_MSR.XCAT_FLG,
BKGS_MSR.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
BKGS_MSR.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
BKGS_MSR.ELA_FLG,
BKGS_MSR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE BKGS_MSR
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN PRD
 ON BKGS_MSR.PRODUCT_KEY=PRD.ITEM_KEY
 INNER  JOIN    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE BKG_CHNL_MSR
 ON  BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=BKG_CHNL_MSR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 AND BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=BKG_CHNL_MSR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
 AND BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=BKG_CHNL_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 INNER JOIN     $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y
 ON BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE= FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE
 AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
 --AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=201411
 /*INNER JOIN    SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV SOL
 ON  SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=CASE WHEN BKGS_MSR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY<=-1000000 THEN -9999 ELSE BKGS_MSR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END 
 AND  SOL.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'*/
 WHERE BKGS_MSR.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG='Y'
 AND BKGS_MSR.SERVICE_FLG='Y') BKGS
 
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
 
 (SELECT 
 LNK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 LNK.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
 ALLOC.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
 ALLOC.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,
 ALLOC.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
 LNK.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
 FROM
 $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SO_LINE_LINK  LNK,
 $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SVC_FIN_HIER_ALLOC ALLOC
 WHERE
 LNK.APPROVED_DEAL_ID=ALLOC.APPROVED_DEAL_ID
 AND 
 LNK.CS_DEAL_PRDT_SUB_GROUP_ID=ALLOC.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID
 AND BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID<>'UNKNOWN') SFH
 
 ON SFH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=BKGS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND SFH.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID=BKGS.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID
 AND SFH.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD=BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
 
 GROUP BY
 BKGS.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG, 
 BKGS. PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY, 
 CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG, 
 BKGS.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
 BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY,
 BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 BKGS.SALES_REP_NUM,
 BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
 BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
 BKGS.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
 BKGS.CANCEL_CODE,
 BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG ,
 BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
 BKGS.DSV_FLG               /* Added as part of  Q1FY16 DSV **/,
  BKGS.XCAT_FLG,
BKGS.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
BKGS.ELA_FLG,
BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD

SEL 
 BKG_CHNL_MSR.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG, 
 BKG_CHNL_MSR.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY  PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY, 
 CASE WHEN BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG IS NULL THEN  'N' ELSE BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG  END CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG, 
 'OTHER' PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
 BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY,
 BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER SALES_REP_NUM,
 FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
 BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
 SUM(BKGS.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY),
 SUM(BKGS.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY),
 BKGS.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 SUM(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT),
 SUM(DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT),
 SUM(DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT),
 SUM(DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT),
 SUM(DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT),
 SUM(DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT),
 SUM(DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT),
 BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 SUM(BKGS.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT),
 SUM(DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT),
 SUM(DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT),
 BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG,
 'OTHER' BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID  ,
 CANCEL_CODE,
 BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
 BKGS.DSV_FLG /* Added as part of  Q1FY16 DSV **/,
 /* Added the below columns as part of  RO project  Q3FY17**/
 BKGS.XCAT_FLG,
 BKGS.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
 BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
BKGS.ELA_FLG,
BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE BKGS
 INNER  JOIN    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE BKG_CHNL_MSR
 ON  BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=BKG_CHNL_MSR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 AND BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=BKG_CHNL_MSR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
 AND BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=BKG_CHNL_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 INNER JOIN     $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y
 ON BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE= FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE
 AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
 --AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=201411
 /*INNER JOIN    SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV SOL
 ON  SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=CASE WHEN BKGS_MSR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY<=-1000000 THEN -9999 ELSE BKGS_MSR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END 
 AND  SOL.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'*/
 WHERE BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG='Y'
 AND BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'
 GROUP BY
 BKG_CHNL_MSR.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG, 
 BKG_CHNL_MSR.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, 
 CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY,
 BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
 BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
 BKGS.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 CANCEL_CODE,
 BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG  ,
 BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
 BKGS.DSV_FLG        /* Added as part of  Q1FY16 DSV **/,
  BKGS.XCAT_FLG,
 BKGS.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
 BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
BKGS.ELA_FLG,
BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
